global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on the brand and a clear call to action.
global.visual_style: bright and modern with geometric shapes
global.main_message: Encouraging users to sign up for a service with confidence.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, possibly representing a product or service.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A secondary graphic element that complements the central graphic, with a simple geometric shape.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: An overlay graphic element that adds depth to the design, featuring a combination of shapes.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned towards the bottom, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element that enhances the overall design.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Save with confidence' with a subtext 'Fast signup; instant card' in a clear, modern font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'SwiftStack' displayed prominently at the top in a bold, easy-to-read font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button stating 'Try for free' in a contrasting color to attract attention.
